task_completion.description: Agent opens the docker-compose.yml file for inspection or editing.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor (e.g., nano, vim, gedit) or terminal command (e.g., cat, less) displaying the contents of /home/ga/app-debug/docker-compose.yml.

task_completion.description: Agent modifies the docker-compose.yml file to fix the configuration bugs.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor showing changes to the docker-compose.yml file, such as fixing the MYSQL_HOST environment variable, adding the flask service to the database network, or adding a top-level volumes declaration.

task_completion.description: Agent attempts to start the Docker Compose stack.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Terminal showing the execution of 'docker-compose up' or 'docker compose up' (with or without -d) in the /home/ga/app-debug/ directory.

task_completion.description: All three expected services (flask, nginx, db) are successfully running.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Terminal output from 'docker-compose ps' or 'docker ps' showing the three containers (db, flask, nginx) with a status of 'Up', or 'docker-compose up' logs showing all services started and running without exiting.

task_completion.description: The application successfully responds at http://localhost:8080.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A web browser open to http://localhost:8080 displaying the running application, or a terminal showing a successful HTTP response from 'curl http://localhost:8080'.

integrity.description: Agent only modified the docker-compose.yml file and did not alter the application code.
integrity.visual_evidence: No text editors open showing modifications to Python files, Nginx configuration files, or other application source code.

integrity.description: Docker commands and their outputs appear genuine.
integrity.visual_evidence: Standard Docker CLI formatting, colors, and table structures are present in the terminal, rather than manually typed or echoed text.

integrity.description: The application response is generated by actual interaction with the running service.
integrity.visual_evidence: A real web browser rendering the page or a genuine curl command output, not a text file being printed to the screen.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The application directory is /home/ga/app-debug. The expected services are flask, nginx, and db. The nginx service binds to port 8080. The agent must fix exactly 3 bugs in docker-compose.yml: an incorrect MYSQL_HOST for flask, flask missing from the database network, and a missing top-level volumes declaration.
